raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Abandoned shopping carts blocking streets and sidewalks have become a significant problem throughout California.",
    "Senator Dave Cortese has introduced SB 753 to address the issue of abandoned shopping carts.",
    "SB 753 allows local governments to return abandoned carts directly to retailers.",
    "Cities can now pick up and return carts immediately under SB 753.",
    "Cities are authorized to recover costs by billing retailers for retrieval services.",
    "The three-day waiting period for cities to return carts has been eliminated by SB 753.",
    "Retailers that fail to retrieve their carts within three days may still have them impounded under current law.",
    "The current state law has proven ineffective at preventing shopping cart abandonment.",
    "Existing law requires cities to wait for retailers to pick up carts from an impound lot, which is inefficient and costly for large cities."
  ]
}
```
